items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a better striking process than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: Benosi I feel has the better process

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's striking technique is very loopy.
items.quote: Patty Pimblet is like very very loopy with the punches

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is sloppy when throwing combinations.
items.quote: Benosadin is also like gets very very sloppy when he send combinations with his hands.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is more capable of identifying specific openings in a fight than Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: Pimpblelet is more likely to find like a specific opening

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is sloppy with his level changes.
items.quote: Benoseni is kind of sloppy with the level changes.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a dangerous grappler with a high-level guillotine and transition game.
items.quote: Patty Pibllet is a very dangerous grappler man. And he has nasty guillotine.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a distinct advantage in the clinch due to his knees and elbows.
items.quote: Benosandi has a very distinct advantage with his nasty knees, his elbows.

items.claim: Max Holloway is a bad stylistic matchup for Conor McGregor.
items.quote: I've always thought that Max Holo is a bad match up for Conor McGregor

items.claim: Max Holloway's chin is showing signs of decline.
items.quote: Max Hollowway's shin is showing some cracks man

items.claim: Conor McGregor's cardio will not hold up in a fight against Max Holloway.
items.quote: I think the cardio is not going to hold up.

items.claim: Max Holloway has improved his ability to sit down on his punches since his first fight with Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Holay has improved a lot since and he's willing to like sit down on punches.
